changelog: 👁️ Jarvis can see your screen — "what am I looking at?", "read the screen", "what does this error say?" He screenshots the screen and describes it aloud with a vision model running entirely on your own machine. Nothing leaves your computer.
🔒 Private by construction — the screenshot and the vision model both stay local.
♿ Reads and understands what's on screen for anyone who can't see it well — the point of ThorOS.
ℹ️ First look downloads the vision model (~3 GB, once); after that it's instant and works offline. Look-don't-touch by design — acting on what he sees comes next, and will always ask first.
